message.content:
@startuml
title 3.1.0 Get Participant Callback Details

participant ML-API-ADAPTER as MLAPIAdapter
participant Central Service API as CentralServiceAPI
participant Participant Handler as ParticipantHandler
participant Participant DAO as ParticipantDAO
participant Central Store as CentralStore

interface ML-API-ADAPTER as MLAPIAdapter

interface Central Service API as CentralServiceAPI

interface Participant Handler as ParticipantHandler

interface Participant DAO as ParticipantDAO

interface Central Store as CentralStore

rectangle Get Callback Details
    MLAPIAdapter
    CentralServiceAPI
    ParticipantHandler
    ParticipantDAO
    CentralStore
end rectangle

rectangle "Get Callback Details"
    MLAPIAdapter
    CentralServiceAPI
    ParticipantHandler
    ParticipantDAO
    CentralStore
end rectangle

rectangle "Validate participant (success)"
    MLAPIAdapter
    CentralServiceAPI
    ParticipantHandler
    ParticipantDAO
    CentralStore
end rectangle

rectangle "Check if \"type\" parameter is sent (Sent)"
    MLAPIAdapter
    CentralServiceAPI
    ParticipantHandler
    ParticipantDAO
    CentralStore
end rectangle

rectangle "Check if \"type\" parameter is sent (Not Sent)"
    MLAPIAdapter
    CentralServiceAPI
    ParticipantHandler
    ParticipantDAO
    CentralStore
end rectangle

rectangle "Validate participant (failure)/ Error"
    MLAPIAdapter
    CentralServiceAPI
    ParticipantHandler
    ParticipantDAO
    CentralStore
end rectangle

MLAPIAdapter ..> CentralServiceAPI : 1 Request to get callback details - GET - /participants/{name}/endpoints?type={typeValue}
CentralServiceAPI ..> ParticipantHandler : 2 Fetch Callback details for Participant
ParticipantHandler ..> ParticipantDAO : 3 Fetch Participant
ParticipantDAO ..> participant : 4 Fetch Participant
participant ..> ParticipantDAO : 5 Retrieved Participant
ParticipantDAO ..> ParticipantHandler : 6 Return Participant
ParticipantHandler ..> MLAPIAdapter : 7 Validate DFSP

alt Validate participant (success)
    ParticipantHandler ..> CentralServiceAPI : 8 check if "type" parameter is sent
    alt Check if "type" parameter is sent (Sent)
        ParticipantHandler ..> ParticipantDAO : 9 Fetch Callback details for Participant and type
        ParticipantDAO ..> participantEndpoint : 10 Fetch Callback details for Participant and type
        participantEndpoint ..> ParticipantDAO : 11 Retrieved Callback details for Participant and type
        ParticipantDAO ..> ParticipantHandler : 12 Return Callback details for Participant and type
        ParticipantHandler ..> MLAPIAdapter : 13 Return Callback details for Participant
        MLAPIAdapter ..> CentralServiceAPI : 14 Return Callback details for Participant
    else Check if "type" parameter is sent (Not Sent)
        ParticipantHandler ..> CentralServiceAPI : 15 Fetch Callback details for Participant
        CentralServiceAPI ..> ParticipantDAO : 16 Fetch Callback details for Participant
        ParticipantDAO ..> participantEndpoint : 17 Retrieved Callback details for Participant
        ParticipantDAO ..> ParticipantHandler : 18 Return Callback details for Participant
        ParticipantHandler ..> MLAPIAdapter : 19 Return Callback details for Participant
        MLAPIAdapter ..> CentralServiceAPI : 20 Return Callback details for Participant
    end alt
end alt

alt Validation failure/ Error!
    ParticipantHandler ..> MLAPIAdapter : 21 Return Error code: 3000, 3200
    MLAPIAdapter ..> CentralServiceAPI : 22 Return Error code: 3000, 3200
end alt
